chunks.content:
Article: S2 Works Disc 7 M 13 and M 14 question
[]: S2 Works Disc 7 M-13 & M-14 question             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 31, 2006 1:23 pm What are the lyrics to M-13 (A-4, Borderline Case, heavy version) (06:16) (incomplete version)? And is M-14: Later Half (00:36) (unedited) was what Anno-sensei was thinking of using as BGM for the eyecatch? I'm kinda glad he didn't if that's the case...it is weird. And M-15, theme of love is nice. Would be cool if this could be in Rebuild. (M-8, Asuka's death, is SOOO heavy (Thanatos, relgious/funeral music-style) and sad while M-9, liberaltion of souls, is cool. Would be nice if we could get that in Rebuild. ) And I also like that other version of Sepration Anxiety (it's one of my favorite pieces anyway) as well as those varations and that acutal pieces used of A-4 (acutal used pieces which I love: It's Fragile, The Ego Border (02:11) Asuka 22' mindrape scene, Anxiety-Ridden Honeymoon (01:38) (zaka zaka version) P3II train scene, Reliance Leads To Falsehood (01:48) (violin solo), P3II Coffepot scene). /gushing about S^2 Works. ;

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Dec 31, 2006 1:44 pm The lyrics are the same as "Evantroduction" from :shudder: VOX. Born evil giant sinner Human spirit lies No compassion tortured soul EVANGELION !! Armageddon day is here Living hell has come Worlds worst nightmare has appeared EVANGELION !

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Dec 31, 2006 1:45 pm I haven't finished downloading the S2 works. Who the fuck puts up a torrent of all the evangelion soundtracks in fucking FLAC format? lossless file compression is for audiophiles.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Dec 31, 2006 2:08 pm *glomps* It's offical: I love you already.

[]:             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sun Dec 31, 2006 2:20 pm FLAC is a lossless audio compression format with higher audio quality than formats such as mp3, however, FLAC suffers of the problem of absolutely ENORMOUS filesizes, individual files can get up to 50 mb or so.
